positive: Stylized, minimalist line art of a whimsical forest creature (like a bioluminescent fox or glowing deer) surrounded by abstract floral elements and constellations. The composition is centered, featuring strong, clean black lines on a solid, muted sage green background. Use a gothic-meets-modern aesthetic with high contrast, emphasizing negative space. The style should mimic intricate woodblock printing or engraving. The creature's form should be elegant and graceful, glowing softly with pops of cyan and violet light. Highly detailed, perfectly centered, ideal for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noisy, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, messy lines, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, photorealism, cartoon, sketch, abstract background, cluttered
